use_cases: Landing pages for SaaS products requiring modern animated hero sections to capture visitor attention
Brand presentations needing dynamic grid backgrounds with wave-effect animations
Marketing websites requiring dark-themed hero sections with gradient accents
Product launches for tech companies with animated visual effects
Portfolio sites needing dynamic visual effects to showcase creative work
ai_summary: A dark-themed hero section featuring a dynamic animated grid background with staggered wave-effect animations. The component includes a branded navigation header with gradient logo, gradient heading text, and a call-to-action button. Uses programmatic DOM generation for the grid bars and CSS keyframe animations for the continuous motion effect. Designed for SaaS and tech product landing pages.
